title: Design Engineer
description:
Company Overview

NACOS Marine is a globally integrated group of companies at the forefront of maritime automation, navigation, and control systems. Building on decades of expertise and a heritage of trusted solutions, NACOS Marine continues to pioneer technologies that set the standard for safer, smarter, and more efficient ship operations worldwide.


Role Overview

We are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Design Engineer (m/f/d) to join our team in Singapore.


In this key role, you will contribute to the design, documentation, and delivery of automation and control systems for complex maritime applications. You will work closely with engineers, project managers, and other stakeholders to ensure high-quality, efficient, and compliant technical deliverables including drawings, documentation, and HMI design.

Your work will play an essential role in ensuring that NACOS Marine systems meet the highest standards of quality, safety, and reliability across global marine and naval projects.


Key Responsibilities

  • Deliver accurate and high-quality project documentation, drawings, and HMI designs for OT systems.
  • Collaborate with project teams to develop and implement technical solutions aligned with project objectives.
  • Evaluate and advise on design modifications and assess potential technical or cost implications.
  • Contribute to project planning and ensure timely completion of design-related deliverables.
  • Participate in internal project meetings, design reviews, and milestone discussions.
  • Ensure compliance with internal and customer-specific quality, safety, and cybersecurity standards.
  • Support colleagues with technical input and resolve design-related challenges promptly.
  • Maintain confidentiality in all project-related matters, particularly in Naval contracts.
  • Willingness to travel internationally for design coordination, testing, or customer engagements.

Key Requirements

  • Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Electrical, Electronic, or Mechanical Engineering from a recognized institution.
  • Proven experience in EPLAN and SolidWorks for design and documentation.
  • Excellent proficiency in English, both written and verbal.
  • Strong communication, teamwork, and organizational abilities.
  • Capable of working independently and effectively within cross-functional teams.
  • Willingness and ability to travel internationally as required.


Why choose us and why we’d choose you

At NACOS, we’re about more than getting the job done, we empower people to take ownership, embrace responsibility, and shape their own path. Innovation thrives here through collaboration, curiosity, and the courage to drive change.

Authenticity is key. When you can truly be yourself at work, great things happen. We believe in openness, honesty, and continuous learning, creating an environment where every voice matters, and people feel valued and supported to grow.


Our team is passionate about building smart technologies that help create a safer and more sustainable maritime future, and we’re looking for a colleague who shares that drive.

We value and embrace diversity in all forms and are committed to creating an inclusive workplace where everyone can succeed based on their talents and contributions.


Does this sound like the right opportunity for you?

We’d love to hear from you. Please submit your application today, and we’ll be in touch soon.
